title: delphinium potaninii var. longibracteatum
intro: Delphinium potaninii var. longibracteatum, also known as Potanin's delphinium, is a plant species that belongs to the Delphinium genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower fever, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and alleviate pain and swelling. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional formulas to enhance its medicinal properties.
